title: The Ring's Owner
description: The lost ring has brought your earlier decision back to you.

returned_ring.title: A Family Remembers
returned_ring.description: The elderly woman's family finds you at an inn. The ring was an heirloom, and they have not forgotten the stranger who returned it.

sold_ring.title: A Familiar Ring for Sale
sold_ring.description: A jeweler displays the ring you sold, while an elderly woman argues that it was stolen from her family. Then she notices you.

kept_ring.title: The Ring Is Recognized
kept_ring.description: The ring slips into view while you pay for a meal. Across the room, its elderly owner gasps and points directly at you.

options.title: Tell the Truth
options.description: Explain exactly what happened and accept the consequences.

options.title: Strike a Bargain
options.description: Memory has value, but so does leverage.

options.title: Deny Everything
options.description: A familiar face is not proof of anything.
